scripts.db:init: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const {Pool}=require('pg'); const fs=require('fs'); const p=new Pool({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL,ssl:{rejectUnauthorized:false}}); p.query(fs.readFileSync('../database/init.sql','utf8')).then(()=>{console.log('DB initialized!');p.end()}).catch(e=>{console.error(e);p.end();})"
